name: Carrot Salad in Mustard and Lemon Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 pound carrots, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice, mustard, the 2 teaspoons sugar, onions, olive oil, salt (if using), and dill in a large cup or cruet. Mix well or shake until very well blended.
2. Add carrots, remaining water, and salt to a large saucepan. Bring the water to a boil; lower heat and cover.
3. Simmer until tender about 5 minutes. Do not overcook.
4. Drain and cool quickly under cold running water to stop further cooking.
5. Transfer to a salad bowl. Pour the dressing over and toss to coat.
6. Add additional seasoning if needed and chill until ready to serve.
